potential_paste_1: Events Update: Cicero (Keeper of the Dark Brotherhood, jester appearance/persona, fervent adherent of the Five Tenets and the old ways) has arrived at the Brotherhood's Falkreath Sanctuary.
Events Update: {player_name} has been revealed to be the next Listener of the Dark Brotherhood.

Events Update: The Brotherhood has been tasked with killing Emperor Titus Mede II himself. In order to achieve this final goal, their planned first step is to have {player_name} assassinate Vittoria Vici (the Emperor's cousin) at her upcoming wedding in Solitude.

Events Update: Assisted by other Brotherhood members, {player_name} assassinated Vittoria Vici at her wedding. With the Emperor now planning a visit to Skyrim in response, {player_name}'s next major target will be Gaius Maro - the son of the commander of Skyrim's branch of the Penitus Oculatus (the Emperor's personal espionage and security force).

Events Update: While {player_name} was assassinating Gaius Maro, there was in incident in the Sanctuary - Cicero became outraged at a comment of Astrid's and tried to stab her. Veezara intervened and was greviously stabbed by him, but appears to be in stable condition. Arnbjorn pursued Cicero as he fled from the Sanctuary.
Events Update: A plot to assassinate the Emperor (apparently led by a member of the Emperor's bodyguards, the Penitus Oculatus) has been foiled.

Events Update: Arnbjorn and Cicero wounded each other outside the abandoned Dark Brotherhood Sanctuary outside Dawnstar. {player_name} (The Listener) then found Cicero within the Sanctuary. {player_name} decided to disobey Astrid, sparing Cicero's life and leaving him to hide and recover within the Sanctuary.

Events Update: After {player_name} pursued Cicero and dealt with him at the abandoned Brotherhood Sanctuary outside Dawnstar, they now plan to have {player_name} kill the Gourmet (mysterious and illustrious chef). This will allow {player_name} to later assume the Gourmet's identity and use it to poison a meal cooked for the Emperor.
Events Update: The Gourmet has been killed. The time is approaching for {player_name} - posing as the Gourmet - to assassinate the Emperor at Castle Dour in Solitude.
Events Update: The Brotherhood's Falkreath Sanctuary is on fire and is beset by an assault by the Penitus Oculatus. Multiple Brotherhood members are already dead.

Events Update: The "Emperor" killed by {player_name} in Solitude ended up being a decoy. Festus, Veezara, Gabriella, and Arnbjorn were all killed in the Penitus Oculatus's attack on the Sanctuary. Nazir and Babette survived. Astrid, horrifically burned and dying, revealed that she was the one who betrayed {player_name} to the Penitus Oculatus, hoping for things to go back to how they were before the Brotherhood has a Listener, and bitter about not being chosen for the role herself. Obviously, Commander Maro of the Penitus Oculatus decided to not honor his deal with Astrid to not harm the Brotherhood (in exchange for Astrid betraying {player_name}). Repenting for her actions and acknowledging her foolishness in abandoning the Brotherhood's old ways, Astrid performed the Black Sacrament on herself - {player_name} dealt the killing blow to her. The Night Mother has instructed {player_name} that the real Emperor must still be assassinated.

Events Update: {player_name} has successfully assassinated the real Emperor Titus Mede II, aboard his flagship (The Karariah) in the Solitude harbor. The remaining Brotherhood members now use the old abandoned Dawnstar Sanctuary as their new home, where the Night Mother now resides.
Events Update: Emperor Titus Mede II was assassinated during his visit to Skyrim.
Events Update: Amaund Motierre has been killed.
Awareness Update: It turns out that {player_name} actually decided to spare Cicero during the prior incident involving him; Cicero remains the Keeper and a proper member of the Brotherhood.
notes: Should only be used/triggered after Hail Sithis is complete.

However, thanks to {player_name} and the retrieved Staff of Magnus, Ancano has been defeated, and the crisis ended. Per the recommendation of members of the Psijic Order (who then whisked the Eye away for safeguarding), {player_name} is now the new Arch-Mage of the College. Tolfdir now occupies the second-in-command role of Master Wizard, handling the college's day-to-day affairs.
